title: Colletoecema dewevrei
taxonomy: Colletoecema dewevrei is a species of moth in the family Depressariidae. It is primarily found in Papua New Guinea. The classification of Colletoecema dewevrei falls under the phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Lepidoptera, and family Depressariidae. Colletoecema dewevrei is a species within the genus Colletoecema. Within the Lepidoptera order, Colletoecema dewevrei is classified as a type of moth.
